query: i've got a SettingsPage.vue that builds the API client inline, runs the fetch, AND writes straight to IndexedDB. feels wrong but i'm not sure how to split it up — what goes where?
adding a new 'bookmarks' feature to my vue app (pinia + idb). how should i lay out the folders and which layer is allowed to open the db connection?

my usePersonaStore is just a plain function that returns a bunch of refs, not a defineStore. a teammate said that breaks state sharing once you remove the app store — is that right and how do i fix it?
can you review this pinia store? it imports another store and does a chunk of business logic inside the actions, and i feel like that's not great
where should the transform between my domain model and the indexeddb record actually live? right now the store does the mapping itself
this component does state.interview.messages.push(...) directly inside a click handler in the template. how am i supposed to do that properly with pinia + the service layer?
i'm putting zod schemas all over my services to validate everything. should i validate internal calls too or only the data coming back from the LLM and file imports?
i have the exact same provider->kind switch copy-pasted in two different vue views that both build the llm client. what's the clean way to dedupe this?
naming sanity check: i have getLLMClient() that reads the pinia store, constructs a client, and logs an error if it fails. is that an ok name for a get* function?
my InterviewPage.vue is ~400 lines — it builds the client, orchestrates four llm calls, mutates the model, and catches errors with try/return. how do i break this apart across the layers?
what's the npm/bun command to add pinia to a fresh vite project and how do i register it as a plugin in main.ts?
my coverage meter looks broken on mobile — the flex row overflows under 640px. how do i fix the responsive css for it?
write me a zod schema that validates an email address and a US phone number with a country code
how do i mock IndexedDB in vitest? fake-indexeddb doesn't seem to reset between test cases and state leaks across them
convert this Options API component to the <script setup> syntax please
what's the actual difference between ref and reactive in vue 3, and when should i reach for each?
my tauri v2 build is failing with a rust linker error on windows, here's the stack trace
should i use opus or sonnet for the synthesis call, and any tips to cut the token cost per run?
add a 300ms debounce to this search input so it stops firing the handler on every keystroke
design a nice empty-state illustration and copy for when the user has no saved items yet
